task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI to extract only the bucket name
solution_criteria: Should correctly extract bucket names from S3 URIs in formats like 's3://my-bucket/key', 's3://my-bucket-123/path/to/file', and handle bucket names with hyphens and numbers

task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that includes function name, runtime, role ARN, timeout, and memory allocation
solution_criteria: Should be valid JSON with all required Lambda configuration properties, proper data types (strings for ARN/name, integers for timeout in seconds and memory in MB), and realistic AWS values

task: Write a Python function that converts an AWS CloudWatch log timestamp (Unix milliseconds) to a human-readable ISO 8601 format string
solution_criteria: Should correctly convert milliseconds since epoch to ISO 8601 format, handle edge cases like zero or very large timestamps, and return a properly formatted datetime string
